about.title: About ATOM Game Shop
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for premium gaming top-ups since March 2022
about.meta_description: Learn about ATOM Game Shop - Your trusted diamond store providing affordable prices and balanced service for Mobile Legends, PUBG, and Honor of Kings since March 2022.
about.hero_subtitle: Top up in seconds, play for hours!!!
about.founded_text: ATOM Game Shop started selling diamonds and UC on Facebook on March 30, 2022, and has received tremendous support from our valued customers.
about.mission_text: Our key product philosophy is 'affordable prices with balanced service.' True to our 'balanced' approach, we prioritize our customers with genuine, sincere, and balanced service.
about.service_text: For everyone who visits and supports our page, we display diamond and UC prices clearly to save time and make purchasing easy. Our payment process is also transparent and convenient for a smooth experience.
about.trust_text: When you need diamonds or UC, choose the most trustworthy store. We recommend supporting ATOM Game Shop, which has earned the highest 5.0-star reviews from thousands of satisfied customers.
about.value_1_desc: Competitive rates that won't break your budget
about.value_2_desc: Fair and sincere service for every customer
about.value_3_desc: Your satisfaction is our top priority
about.value_4_desc: Clear pricing and honest communication always

guide.title: Guides
guide.subtitle: Step-by-step video tutorials to help you get started with ATOM Game Shop
guide.step1_desc: Learn how to open your Atom game shop account to make Top-Up process.
guide.step1_point1: Click the create account button at Home Page
guide.step2_desc: Learn how to add funds to your wallet for seamless transactions.
guide.step3_desc: Purchase Mobile Legends diamonds using your wallet balance.
guide.step3_point3: Enter your Mobile Legends ID and Zone
guide.tip1_desc: Diamonds are delivered instantly after successful payment confirmation.
guide.tip2_desc: All transactions are protected with advanced encryption technology.
guide.tip3_desc: Access our platform from any device - desktop, tablet, or mobile.
guide.tip4_desc: Double-check your Mobile Legends ID and Zone before purchasing.
guide.tip_1: Always double-check your game ID before purchasing
guide.tip_2: Keep your account balance topped up for faster transactions
guide.tip_3: Contact support if you need help with any step
guide.cta_desc: Browse our diamond packages or get in touch if you need assistance

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.main: ATOM Game Shop is an independent third-party platform that provides digital game top-up services. We are not officially affiliated with, partnered with, or endorsed by Moonton (Mobile Legends: Bang Bang), PUBG Corporation / KRAFTON, or any other game publishers. All game names, logos, and trademarks used are the property of their respective owners.
disclaimer.third_party_content: The site may contain (or you may be sent through the site) links to other websites or content belonging to or originating from third parties or links to websites and features in banners or other advertising. Such external links are not investigated, monitored, or checked for accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability or completeness by us.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: At ATOM Game Shop (atomgameshop.com), we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data when you use our website and services.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect the following information:
list: Personal information (such as name, email address, phone number)
Account details (username, login information)
Payment and wallet transaction information
Game-related information (Game ID, Server ID)
Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
list: Provide game top-up and digital services
Process payments and wallet transactions
Manage user accounts
Improve our website and services
Communicate with users regarding orders, promotions, or support
Prevent fraud and ensure security

sections.title: 3. Data Protection & Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.

sections.title: 4. Sharing of Information
sections.content: We do not sell or trade your personal information. Your data may only be shared with:
list: Payment service providers
Legal authorities if required by law
Service partners strictly for service delivery purposes

sections.title: 5. Cookies
sections.content: Our website may use cookies to enhance user experience, analyze traffic, and improve services. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

sections.title: 6. User Rights
list: Access your personal data
Request correction or deletion of your data
Withdraw consent at any time

sections.title: 7. Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those websites.

sections.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.

sections.title: 9. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms_conditions.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_conditions.intro: Welcome to ATOM Game Shop (atomgameshop.com). By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using this website, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old or have permission from a legal guardian, and you agree to these Terms & Conditions.

sections.title: 2. Services
sections.content: ATOM Game Shop provides digital game top-up services, including but not limited to in-game currency, digital items, and wallet top-ups. All purchases are digital goods and are delivered electronically.

sections.title: 3. User Account
list: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account information.
You agree to provide accurate and complete information.
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts involved in fraud, abuse, or violations of these terms.

sections.title: 4. Payments & Pricing
list: Prices are displayed on the website and may change without prior notice.
All payments must be completed before services are delivered.
ATOM Game Shop is not responsible for incorrect top-ups caused by wrong Game ID or Server ID provided by the user.

sections.title: 5. No Refund Policy
sections.content: All sales are final. Due to the nature of digital goods, refunds, cancellations, or exchanges are not allowed once the order has been processed.

sections.title: 6. Service Delivery
list: Most top-ups are processed instantly; however, delays may occur due to technical issues or third-party systems.
We are not responsible for delays caused by game publishers or external service providers.

sections.title: 7. Prohibited Activities
list: Use the service for illegal or unauthorized purposes
Attempt to hack, abuse, or disrupt the website
Provide false or misleading information
Use stolen or unauthorized payment methods

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on this website, including logos, text, images, and design, belongs to ATOM Game Shop or its partners and may not be used without permission.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: ATOM Game Shop shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

sections.title: 10. Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to our services at any time without notice if these Terms & Conditions are violated.

sections.title: 11. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.title: 12. Contact Information
sections.content: For any questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact:
